content: 我决定把数据库从MySQL迁移到PostgreSQL 16
选择用Redis做缓存，Memcached不再维护了
前端框架确定采用React 18，配合Next.js
部署方案改用Kubernetes替代Docker Swarm
日志收集改成Loki，不用ELK了，太重了
消息队列最终选了Kafka，RabbitMQ并发扛不住
状态管理确定用Zustand，比Redux轻量太多
分布式锁用Redisson实现，别用数据库锁
图数据库最终选了Neo4j，ArangoDB社区太小
对象存储用MinIO自建，不依赖S3了
代码质量工具选SonarQube，配合pre-commit hooks
I decided to use FastAPI instead of Flask for the new service
We're going with PostgreSQL over MongoDB for this project
Let's adopt TypeScript for all new frontend code going forward
Settled on Terraform for infrastructure as code
After evaluation, we chose gRPC over REST for internal services
Switching from Yarn to pnpm for package management
We've decided to go with Vercel for frontend hosting
The team agreed to use Conventional Commits going forward
We're migrating from Heroku to AWS ECS for production
Picked Tailwind CSS over styled-components for the redesign
Going with Vite instead of Webpack for the build system
Decided to use Prisma as the ORM for the Node.js backend
We'll adopt trunk-based development instead of GitFlow
Switching authentication from JWT to session-based with Redis
Chose Playwright over Cypress for E2E testing
Going serverless with AWS Lambda for the webhook handlers
We'll use Cloudflare Workers for edge computing
PostgreSQLを採用することに決定しました
フロントエンドはReactからVueに変更します
ES集群3个节点，每个32GB内存，端口9200
数据库连接池最大50个连接，超时30秒
API限流配置：普通用户100次/分钟，VIP 1000次/分钟
日志保留策略：生产环境30天，测试环境7天
定时任务cron表达式：0 3 * * * (每天凌晨3点)
K8s集群3个master节点，5个worker，用的是1.28版本
The API gateway runs on port 8080 with SSL termination
Database backup runs daily at 3am UTC, retention 30 days
API rate limit: 100 req/min for free tier, 1000 for pro
Redis Sentinel: 3 sentinels, quorum=2, master on port 6379
Production server: 4 CPU cores, 16GB RAM, 500GB SSD
DNS TTL set to 300 seconds for api.example.com
Elasticsearch index template: 3 primary shards, 1 replica
The CI pipeline timeout is set to 30 minutes max
Load balancer health check: GET /health every 10 seconds
JWT token expiry: access 15min, refresh 7 days
S3 bucket policy: only IAM role arn:aws:iam::123:role/app can write
サーバーのIPは192.168.1.50、ポートは8080です
我喜欢用VS Code，不喜欢JetBrains的IDE
习惯用Vim模式写代码，已经用了十年了
不喜欢用ORM，更倾向写原生SQL
I prefer tabs over spaces, always 4-width
Recommend using async/await over callbacks in all new code
I like dark themes in all my editors and terminals
Prefer composition over inheritance in our codebase
Always use named exports, never default exports
I prefer monorepo structure for related services
错了，密钥轮换周期是60天不是90天
其实数据库版本是16.2，不是16.0
搞错了，Redis用的是Cluster模式不是Sentinel
更正：生产环境的域名是api.prod.example.com
刚才说的不对，连接池大小是100不是50
之前说用MongoDB是错的，已经改回PostgreSQL了
Actually, the database is on port 5433, not 5432
Wait, I was wrong. The timeout should be 30s, not 60s
Correction: the S3 bucket name is prod-assets not prod-data
No, the API endpoint is /v2/users not /v1/users
Wrong, the deployment is on us-east-1 not us-west-2
记住：每周三凌晨2点执行数据库备份
别忘了：生产环境禁止使用root账户
务必记住：API密钥每90天必须轮换一次
重要：所有敏感数据必须加密存储
千万别忘：部署前必须跑完集成测试
牢记：线上数据库禁止直接执行DELETE语句
Remember: API keys must be rotated every 90 days
Important: never expose internal IPs in API responses
Don't forget: always tag Docker images with the git SHA
Keep in mind: the staging DB resets every Sunday night
Note: all new endpoints must have rate limiting enabled
Make sure to run migrations before deploying the new version
覚えて：本番環境では必ずログレベルをWARNに設定
下一步需要配置Prometheus监控告警
接下来要把日志从文件切换到ELK Stack
待办：给用户模块加上分页功能
本周内必须完成数据库索引优化
明天之前把单元测试覆盖率提到80%
需要给订单接口加上幂等性校验
下个迭代重构支付模块，当前技术债太多
TODO: add rate limiting to the /api/upload endpoint
Need to set up automated database backups by Friday
FIXME: the connection pool leaks under high concurrency
Next step: implement OAuth2 flow for third-party apps
Action item: migrate all secrets to HashiCorp Vault
Must upgrade Node.js to v22 before the security deadline
Follow up: benchmark the new query after adding indexes
psql -h prod-db -U admin -d myapp -c 'SELECT count(*) FROM users'
pip install -r requirements.txt && python manage.py migrate
ERROR: ConnectionRefusedError: [Errno 111] Connection refused on port 5432
OOM Killed: container myapp exceeded memory limit 512Mi
Root cause: Redis maxmemory reached, allkeys-lru evicting active sessions
Bug: race condition in order creation when concurrent requests hit the same inventory
发现内存泄漏：每次请求后goroutine数量递增不释放
线上告警：API P99延迟超过2秒，原因是慢查询没走索引
502 Bad Gateway after deploying v3.2, nginx upstream timeout
SSL handshake failure: certificate expired on 2025-12-31
数据库死锁：事务A持有users表锁等待orders表，事务B反向
会议决定：Q2目标是将API响应时间降到200ms以下
张三负责后端重构，李四负责前端迁移，周五前完成
评审结论：新架构方案通过，下周开始实施
产品确认：用户注册流程简化为手机号+验证码，去掉邮箱
运维同意：生产环境扩容到8台机器，预算已批准
Sprint review: agreed to prioritize payment refund feature for next sprint
Tech lead approved the microservices migration plan, starting with auth service
Team agreed: all PRs need at least 2 approvals before merging to main
Postmortem conclusion: add circuit breaker to payment gateway calls
架构决策：采用CQRS模式分离读写，读用ES，写用PostgreSQL
选择事件驱动架构，服务间通过Kafka异步通信
数据库分库分表策略：按用户ID hash取模，分16个库
前后端分离，BFF层用GraphQL聚合多个微服务
采用Sidecar模式部署服务网格，用Istio做流量管控
Architecture decision: use event sourcing for the audit trail system
Adopting hexagonal architecture for the core domain services
Multi-tenant design: shared database with tenant_id column, not separate DBs
API versioning strategy: URL path (/v1/, /v2/) not headers
Caching strategy: L1 local cache (Caffeine 5min) + L2 Redis (1hr)

还没想好用什么数据库

Haven't decided on the framework yet
Not sure yet, will decide later
Maybe we'll switch to Redis, not decided
I'll figure out the deployment later
我的猫今天又把花盆打翻了
I had the best pizza yesterday
My cat keeps knocking things off the desk
Planning a road trip this summer
Started reading a new book last night
后端语言统一用Go，新服务不再用Java了
缓存一致性策略选Cache-Aside模式
全链路压测工具选JMeter，放弃Locust
灰度发布方案用Canary部署，不用蓝绿
Decided to use Rust for the performance-critical data pipeline
Going with DynamoDB for the session store, not Redis
Choosing Supabase over Firebase for the BaaS layer
Adopting Nix for reproducible development environments
We'll use feature flags via LaunchDarkly instead of env vars
Switched the ML pipeline from TensorFlow to PyTorch
ストレージはGCS（Google Cloud Storage）に決定
CI/CDはGitHub Actionsに統一する方針にしました
GitHub webhook secret: whsec_xxxxx, 端口9000
ECS task定义：CPU 1024, Memory 2048, 最小实例2个
PagerDuty escalation policy: 5min → on-call, 15min → team lead
Terraform state stored in S3 bucket: tf-state-prod-us-east-1
GitHub Actions runner: ubuntu-latest, Node 22, Python 3.12
Database connection string uses SSL mode=verify-full
Auto-scaling policy: scale up at CPU>70%, scale down at CPU<30%
ポート番号は3000で、環境変数NODE_ENVはproduction
API 요청 제한: 분당 500건, 초과 시 429 응답
纠正一下，CDN供应商是Cloudflare不是CloudFront
Wait, the memory limit should be 4GB, I said 2GB earlier
実は、デプロイ先はAWSではなくGCPでした
千万记住：线上禁止执行DROP TABLE
For future reference: the admin panel password resets every 30 days
忘れないで：ステージング環境のデータは毎週リセット
kubectl get pods -n production -o wide | grep -v Running
pg_dump -Fc mydb | aws s3 cp - s3://backups/mydb-$(date +%s).dump
EXPLAIN ANALYZE SELECT * FROM orders WHERE created_at > now() - interval '1 day'
FATAL: too many connections for role 'app_user', max=100
WARNING: disk usage at 92% on /data volume, pod may be evicted
慢查询告警：SELECT * FROM users WHERE email LIKE '%@gmail.com' 耗时12秒
证书过期导致HTTPS握手失败，影响所有API调用
Kafka consumer lag exceeded 10000 on topic: order-events
安全评审结论：密码必须至少12位，含大小写+数字+特殊字符
Tech debt review: allocated 20% of next sprint for refactoring auth module
Stakeholder approved: sunset legacy API v1 by end of Q3
SLA确认：核心API可用性99.9%，响应时间P95<500ms
异步任务重试策略：指数退避，最大重试3次，间隔1s/4s/16s
Data pipeline architecture: Kafka → Flink → ClickHouse → Grafana
Auth flow: OAuth2 PKCE for SPA, client credentials for service-to-service
分库策略：订单按user_id%16，商品按category_id分区
Disaster recovery: RPO=1hr (hourly backups), RTO=4hr (failover to DR site)
紧急：今天下班前修复支付回调超时问题
Urgent: patch the log4j vulnerability before end of day
Sprint goal: complete user authentication refactoring
明天演示前把首页加载速度优化到2秒以内
Deadline Friday: migrate all environment variables to Vault
Prefer small PRs, max 300 lines of change per PR
习惯先写测试再写实现，TDD方式开发
I like keeping functions under 20 lines, extract if longer
偏好用docker-compose本地开发，不直接装服务
